<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="zh">

<head>

  <meta charset="UTF-8">

  <title>命理报告 · 道器</title>

  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">

  <link rel="icon" href="favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">

  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>

  <script src="__URL_2__"></script>

</head>

<body>

  <div id="main-wrap">

    <header>

      <h1>道器命理报告</h1>

    </header>

    <div id="panelBazi"></div>

    <div id="panelMianxiang"></div>

    <div id="panelWuyunLiuqi"></div>

    <div id="panelFengshui"></div>

    <div id="panelLiunian"></div>

    <div id="panelJiaocha"></div>

    <div id="panelExpertCTA"></div>

  </div>

  <script>

    // 加载命理报告 (核心 JS)

    async function loadReport() {

      const params = JSON.parse(window.sessionStorage.getItem('reportParams') || '{}');

      // 构造 API URL

      const apiUrl = '/api/bazi?' + Object.entries(params).map(([k, v]) => `<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="__URL_3__"><semantics><mrow><mrow><mi>e</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>c</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>d</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>U</mi><mi>R</mi><mi>I</mi><mi>C</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>m</mi><mi>p</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>t</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><mo>=</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">{encodeURIComponent(k)}=</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal">n</span><span class="mord mathnormal">co</span><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:0.10903em;">U</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:0.00773em;">R</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:0.07847em;">I</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:0.07153em;">C</span><span class="mord mathnormal">o</span><span class="mord mathnormal">m</span><span class="mord mathnormal">p</span><span class="mord mathnormal">o</span><span class="mord mathnormal">n</span><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal">n</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:0.03148em;">k</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">=</span></span></span></span>{encodeURIComponent(v)}`).join('&');

      let data;

      try {

        const resp = await fetch(apiUrl, { method: 'GET', timeout: 20000 });

        if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('API请求失败');

        data = await resp.json();

      } catch (e) {

        document.getElementById('panelBazi').innerHTML = `<p class="error">命理报告加载失败，请稍后重试。</p>`;

        return;

      }

      if (!data || !data.personality) {

        document.getElementById('panelBazi').innerHTML = `<p class="error">报告数据为空或出错。</p>`;

        return;

      }

      // 渲染各面板

      document.getElementById('panelBazi').innerHTML = buildBaziPanel(data);

      document.getElementById('panelMianxiang').innerHTML = buildMianXiangPanel(data);

      document.getElementById('panelWuyunLiuqi').innerHTML = buildWuyunLiuqiPanel(data);

      document.getElementById('panelFengshui').innerHTML = buildFengshuiPanel(data);

      document.getElementById('panelLiunian').innerHTML = buildLiunianPanel(data);

      document.getElementById('panelJiaocha').innerHTML = buildJiaochaPanel(data);

      document.getElementById('panelExpertCTA').innerHTML = buildExpertCTA(data);

    }

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', loadReport);


    // 以下为面板构建函数（示例/需根据实际需求完善）

    function buildBaziPanel(d) {

      return `

        <section class="report-card">

          <h2>八字排盘</h2>

          <dl>

            <dt>姓名：</dt><dd>${d.name || '未知'}</dd>

            <dt>性别：</dt><dd>${d.gender || '未知'}</dd>

            <dt>出生：</dt><dd><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="__URL_4__"><semantics><mrow><mrow><mi>d</mi><mi mathvariant="normal">.</mi><mi>y</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>r</mi></mrow><mo>−</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">{d.year}-</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:0.8889em;vertical-align:-0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span><span class="mord">.</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:0.03588em;">y</span><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:0.02778em;">r</span></span><span class="mord">−</span></span></span></span>{d.month}-<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="__URL_5__"><semantics><mrow><mi>d</mi><mi mathvariant="normal">.</mi><mi>d</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>y</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">{d.day}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:0.8889em;vertical-align:-0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span><span class="mord">.</span><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:0.03588em;">y</span></span></span></span></span>{d.hour || ''} (${d.calendar || '未知'})</dd>

            <dt>五行比重：</dt><dd><span class="katex-error" title="ParseError: KaTeX parse error: Expected &#x27;}&#x27;, got &#x27;EOF&#x27; at end of input: ….map(([k,v])=&gt;`" style="color:#cc0000">{d.wuxingCount ? Object.entries(d.wuxingCount).map(([k,v])=&gt;`</span>{k}:${v}`).join('、') : '未知'}</dd>

            <dt>格局：</dt><dd>${d.geju || '无'}</dd>

          </dl>

          <p>${d.personality || '暂无详解'}</p>

        </section>

      `;

    }

    function buildMianXiangPanel(d) {

      return `<section class="report-card"><h2>面相诊断</h2><p>面相分析模块待开发——欢迎反馈建议。</p></section>`;

    }

    function buildWuyunLiuqiPanel(d) {

      return `<section class="report-card"><h2>五运六气</h2><p>五运六气分析模块待开发——敬请期待。</p></section>`;

    }

    function buildFengshuiPanel(d) {

      return `<section class="report-card"><h2>风水推断</h2><p>风水分析模块待开发——敬请期待。</p></section>`;

    }

    function buildLiunianPanel(d) {

      return `<section class="report-card"><h2>流年分析</h2><p>流年分析模块待开发——敬请期待。</p></section>`;

    }

    function buildJiaochaPanel(d) {

      return `<section class="report-card"><h2>交叉验证</h2><p>交叉验证说明模块待开发——敬请期待。</p></section>`;

    }

    function buildExpertCTA(d) {

      return `<section class="report-card expert-cta"><h2>专家咨询</h2><p>如需深入命理咨询，请联系道器命理平台。</p></section>`;

    }

  </script>

</body>

</html>
